name: Chicken and Bacon Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the diced cooked chicken, diced crisp bacon, diced celery, and chopped hard cooked eggs in a large bowl.
2. Season the mixture with salt and pepper to taste.
3. In a separate small bowl, mix together the mayonnaise and chili sauce.
4. Stir the mayo-chili sauce mixture into the salad until well combined.
5. Chill the salad mixture for at least 30 minutes before serving.
6. Serve in salad bowls.
